description_long: This is a modern, tactical sniper rifle with a long, slender barrel and a robust, angular stock. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision long-range shooting. A bipod is attached near the front of the barrel, providing stability when firing from a prone or supported position. The body is primarily matte black, with a boxy magazine and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical for contemporary military or law enforcement rifles. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability.
description: A matte black tactical sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, bipod, and angular stock, built for precision and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and the scope aligned above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, scope, bipod, box magazine, and angular stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine and bipod more visible.
